name: Tuna Vegetable Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Cook onion, garlic, carrots, and celery, stirring, for 5 to 8 minutes or until softened.
2. Add potatoes, stock, dill, and lemon rind. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to medium-low. Cover and simmer for 12 to 15 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
4. Drain tuna, reserving the liquid. Break tuna into large chunks and add to the pan along with the reserved liquid, milk, corn, peas, salt, and pepper.
5. Heat through. Taste and adjust seasoning.
6. Makes 8 cups or 4 to 6 servings.
NOTES: 2% or whole milk can be substituted for skim milk but the calorie and fat contents will be higher. Per Serving - Calories 144.4, Total Fat 1.6g.
